allow: Bash(xcodebuild -scheme Tally -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' build 2>&1 | tail -5)
Bash(xcodebuild -scheme Tally -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' build 2>&1 | tail -3)
Bash(xcodebuild -scheme Tally -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' build 2>&1 | grep -E '\(error:|BUILD|warning:.*\\.swift\)' | head -40)
